description_long: A multi-tiered display stand holds a collection of muffins, each with a golden-brown, slightly domed top and a deep blue wrapper. The muffins are arranged in three levels, with the largest muffin at the top and smaller muffins distributed on the lower tiers. The stand itself is made of a dark, glossy material with a faceted, polygonal shape, providing a modern and elegant presentation. The muffin tops appear soft and slightly textured, with no visible toppings or frosting. The wrappers are uniform in color and lack any decorative patterns. The overall arrangement suggests a bakery or café setting, ideal for serving multiple guests.
description: A tiered stand displays golden-brown muffins in blue wrappers, arranged from largest at the top to smaller ones below. The stand is dark, glossy, and faceted, giving a modern look.
description_view_0: This view shows the muffins from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the three-tiered arrangement and the glossy, faceted surfaces of the stand.
description_view_1: From this angle, the largest muffin on the top tier is most prominent, with the lower tiers and their muffins receding into the background.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the symmetry of the muffin arrangement and the reflective quality of the stand's surface.
description_view_3: Here, the muffins on the lower tiers are more visible, and the blue wrappers are clearly seen against the dark stand.
attribute_placement_location: on a dark, glossy, multi-tiered display stand
